dts.title: DVSA wait times mapped: which UK cities have the longest queues right now?
dts.format: 60-sec talking-head or screen-record showing a visual map of DVSA waiting times by region, ending with a CTA to use DTS to grab a cancelled slot weeks earlier.

dts.title: I got my driving test 8 weeks earlier — here's exactly how
dts.format: Story-style walkthrough of the DTS platform in under 60 seconds: how to set up alerts, what a swap looks like, and how fast slots move — social proof-led with a screenshot of the notification.

athletics.title: Track day breakdown: warm-up → drills → full-effort 100m sprint
athletics.format: POV-style clip at the track showing the full session arc — dynamic warm-up, acceleration drills, a timed sprint rep, and a brief voiceover on what each phase trains.

athletics.title: 3 calisthenics moves that carry over to sprint speed
athletics.format: Short gym clip demonstrating explosive push-ups, dips, and hanging leg raises with a voiceover explaining the power-to-weight rationale and how they improved Dowayne's drive phase.

aimybiz.title: Your sales team is losing on objection handling — watch this 60-second AI coaching session
aimybiz.format: Short screen-record of a CloseCoach AI roleplay on a classic 'we already have a supplier' objection, with a talking-head intro and a CTA to book a team demo.

aimybiz.title: How a 5-person estate agency sales team cut their no-show rate by 40% using AI coaching in 60 days
aimybiz.format: Case-study carousel (5 slides): problem → solution → CloseCoach feature used → result → CTA; leads with a bold stat in slide 1 to stop the scroll, targets heads of sales in estate agency and recruitment.
